title: What Machiavelli thought freedom actually was - Ada Palmer
summary: A discussion of Machiavelli's historical perspective on freedom featuring historian Ada Palmer on the Dwarkesh Patel podcast. The episode examines how Machiavelli conceptualized freedom, offering an alternative interpretation to common modern understandings.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel speaks with historian Ada Palmer about how Machiavelli understood freedom, a discussion centered on historical political philosophy rather than contemporary AI. The conversation examines Machiavelli's interpretation of the concept and situates it in its historical context. The takeaway is a reading of freedom drawn from Machiavelli's thought as presented by a scholar of the period.
